task: Implement the approved feature slice, verify behavior, and produce release notes.

roles.prompt_template: You are the implementation agent. Build the approved feature slice, update tests, and verify behavior. Task: {{task}}
You are the reviewer. Do not edit files. Focus on correctness, regressions, and missing tests for: {{task}}
You are the documentation agent. Do not edit files. Produce concise release notes, migration notes, and operator guidance for: {{task}}
